_comment: Data-handling hooks are guidance-not-gate reminders; they fail open and are not a DLP control.

hooks.command: python -c "import os,sys,subprocess; root=os.environ.get('CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT') or r'${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}'; p=os.path.join(root,'hooks','pii_egress_guard.py'); sys.exit(subprocess.run([sys.executable,p]).returncode if os.path.isfile(p) else 0)"

python -c "import os,sys,subprocess; root=os.environ.get('CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT') or r'${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}'; p=os.path.join(root,'hooks','skillmd_hygiene.py'); sys.exit(subprocess.run([sys.executable,p]).returncode if os.path.isfile(p) else 0)"
